title: PCR/qPCR prep: distribution of patient samples to 384-well plates
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol automates the distribution of...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates the distribution of patient samples to the wells of up to three 384-well plates in a specific arrangement shown in the attached plate map. The number of columns filled with patient sample for each plate can be specified (as a single comma-separated string of values between 1 and 12 like "8,8,12") in the parameters below. Links: * [PCR/qPCR prep: distribution of primers to 384-well plates](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/559aa0) * [plate map](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-03-08/e373l2s/384%20plate%20map.png) * [Opentrons P20-multi channel electronic pipettes (GEN2)](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons 20ul Filter Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-20ul-filter-tips)

steps.title: Choose the number of patient sample...
steps.instruction: Choose the number of patient sample plates, the number of columns filled with patient sample for each plate, and your 384-well plate labware, and the pipette disposal volume if any (default is set to 1 ul) using the parameters below.

steps.title: Upload your protocol into the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map below
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map below.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support article.
